rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase affects local property tax revenue, while §48.279 governs state financial support for special education under federal IDEA maintenance requirements. No direct statutory conflict exists between the two provisions.
quote: Funds appropriated for purposes of this section or transferred in accordance with this section are state funds for purposes of compliance with the requirements regarding maintenance of state financial support for special education under 20 U.S.C. Section 1412(a)(18).
_note: No direct conflict. §48.279 addresses state-level special education funding maintenance; the homestead exemption change operates on local property tax appraisals under Tax Code §11.13(b). Any fiscal pressure on state funds would be indirect and budgetary, not a statutory conflict.
